scripts.setup: cd cli && npm install && npm run build && (npm link 2>/dev/null || echo 'Note: npm link failed (try with sudo or use npx). You can run: node cli/dist/index.js')
scripts.build: cd cli && npm install && npm run build
scripts.link: cd cli && npm install && npm run build && npm link
scripts.postinstall: cd cli && npm run build 2>/dev/null || true
